{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322042242507C158DF1794F14A845"}"},"total":3866},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7544707623120421694","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好看，剧情很新颖，女主开店，不会有和别的文一样和顾客相处成朋友的情节。看之前有看到评论说有辱女，我看到最新138章了，反正我没看到，如果觉得恶人骂臭娘们也叫辱女，那我就没话说了。文里描述美食画面也很不错，以前看过很多末世文，觉得不像末世，看到这个文才发觉，真正的末世，普通人过的真的很惨，官方更惨，借用文里的一句话：在绝望中麻木的活着，就已经花光了全部的力气。作者真的把一切惨烈画面都描写的很好，看的很带入，很有共情感。","text_exts":[{"e":138,"s":135,"text":"普通人","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%99%AE%E9%80%9A%E4%BA%BA&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741245624F14A845%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227544707623120421694%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227519389279345200152%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%99%AE%E9%80%9A%E4%BA%BA%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1756640830,"group_id":"7519389279345200152","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5huOWqKUkxYwqdcbnookHqp/Hk+kBNZkWP0WBGCQgWv","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/acf4cae257c541ab9a46be4f82ddc9f6~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776701587&x-signature=Jd%2FNqe69E1Ery%2BSvLMhRC7fQB9k%3D","user_id":"1644471626499502","user_name":"招财婧宝·"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1644471626499502","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"sticker":{"expire_time":1775148673,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7519389279345200152","book_info":{"abstract":"　   【末世+经营+系统+美食+种田+无cp，偏群像】
　　
　　凌菁死后绑定了经营系统，被随机投放到了变异动植物的末世。
　　系统让她为自己餐厅命名，她思考片刻，输入：中华餐厅。
　　
　　变异末日，所有动植物都变成了敌人。
　　饥肠辘辘的濒死人类闻到烤土豆的香味时，露出不可置信的目光。
　　吃到烤红薯时，眼泪和口水一块儿流。
　　
　　凌菁：这才哪到哪？
　　
　　随着菜谱解锁，酸辣土豆丝糖醋排骨水煮鱼、麻辣烫火锅小烧烤、肉夹馍羊肉泡馍地三鲜……
　　无人能抵挡的中华美食让末日人类陷入疯狂。
　　
　　这些都是中华美食？中华是什么地方！好厉害啊！
　　
　　什么！？
　　
　　这些不只是没见过的美食，还能解毒、减弱污染、增强护甲、帮助抵御变异动植物的入侵？！！！
　　
　　“老板，您是来拯救我们的救世主吗？”来就餐的客人满含热泪地问。
　　
　　“不。”凌菁把盘子归置好，露出了一个淡然的微笑：“我只是一家中华餐厅的老板而已。”
